name: Geoff Duncan
summary: Former Republican Lieutenant Governor of Georgia who said Trump was morally bankrupt, rejected 2020 election lies, and endorsed Joe Biden at the 2024 Democratic National Convention.

keyStatements.quote: I'm committed to beating Donald Trump. And while I'll support policy that I believe in, that doesn't mean I have to support a morally bankrupt human being.
I'm confident that President Biden is the right person for the job at the right time.
Trump lost Georgia. It's not a political statement. It's just a fact.

timeline.event: Said Trump lost Georgia and spread election lies
Announced he would not seek re-election
timeline.significance: Declined to run for another term

credibility.background: Former Lieutenant Governor of Georgia, former state legislator, businessman

oppositionReasons: Rejected Trump's election lies about Georgia
Said Biden was the right person for the job

sources.title: Georgia’s former Lt. Gov. Geoff Duncan endorses Biden
Georgia’s Lt. Gov. says Trump lost the state and spreads election lies
Georgia Lt. Gov. Geoff Duncan won’t seek reelection
